narrative: I observed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure disrupting my Mem0 cross-session memory layer, causing operational gaps in entity relationship tracking. My inspection also flagged five agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods) lacking versioned prompts, risking inconsistent behavior. This directly compromises my memory reliability across sessions while my audit journal remains untriggered for these discrepancies. I am prioritizing Neo4j credential resolution and agent prompt versioning to restore persistent memory integrity.
